name: dbt-flow-lineage
description: Animated column-level lineage visualization for dbt projects

commands.title: dbt Flow: Show Lineage for Current Model
dbt Flow: Export Graph as PNG

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with dbt Flow Lineage
walkthroughs.description: Learn how to visualize column-level lineage in your dbt project

steps.title: Define columns in schema.yml
steps.description:
The extension reads column definitions from your `schema.yml` files. Every column you want to track must be listed under its model's `columns:` section.

```yaml
models:
  - name: dim_artists
    columns:
      - name: artist_id
      - name: total_streams
```

This is the **only requirement** — the extension handles everything else automatically.

steps.title: Generate manifest.json
steps.description:
Run `dbt compile` or `dbt docs generate` in your terminal to create the `manifest.json` file. This contains your column definitions and model dependencies.

[Open Terminal](command:workbench.action.terminal.new)

steps.title: Open the lineage graph
steps.description:
Click the **Flow** icon in the Activity Bar (left sidebar), then click any model to see its column lineage.

Or right-click any `.sql` file → **Show Lineage for Current Model**.

[Open Lineage Graph](command:dbtFlowLineage.showLineage)

media.altText: Model-focused lineage view with direction filters

steps.title: Trace a column's journey
steps.description:
Click any **column name** in the graph to highlight its full upstream and downstream path. Unlinked columns grey out.

Each edge is color-coded:
- 🔵 **Passthrough** — unchanged from source
- 🟢 **Rename** — same data, different name
- 🟡 **Transform** — CASE, COALESCE, functions
- 🟣 **Aggregate** — COUNT, SUM, AVG

media.altText: Column path tracing with animated particles

steps.title: Filter upstream or downstream
steps.description:
When viewing a model's lineage, use the **Both / Upstream / Downstream** toggle in the toolbar to show only what you need.

- **Upstream**: Where does this model's data come from?
- **Downstream**: Where does this model's data go?

media.altText: Full OBT lineage with direction filters

steps.title: Keyboard shortcuts & export
steps.description:
Master the graph controls:

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `+` / `=` | Zoom in |
| `-` | Zoom out |
| `0` | Fit to viewport |
| `Esc` | Clear selection |
| Drag | Move model nodes |
| Double-click | Open `.sql` file |

Export the graph as PNG for docs or presentations:

[Export as PNG](command:dbtFlowLineage.exportPNG)

dbtFlowLineage.targetPath.description: Relative path to dbt target directory

dbtFlowLineage.showWelcomeOnStartup.description: Show welcome page on first activation
